din467.source: DIN 467 flat/low knurled nut (M12): knurled outer diameter d=40 and overall height h=12 tabulated, confirmed vs Aspen Fasteners DIN 467 spec + Scribd DIN 467 stainless table + Fastenright + JW Winco. Modelled as a smooth cylindrical disc (the knurl is a fine feature, not drawn, like the thread; the ~2 mm seating shoulder is likewise not modelled). bore=10.1 (M12 minor, ISO 724).

din466.source: DIN 466 high knurled nut (M12): knurled head OD d=40, total height 25 = head h=15 + plain boss (collar_d=22, collar_h=10), tabulated and confirmed vs Boutet Technics DIN 466 table + Fastenright + JW Winco (Aspen/Fuller M10 row dk=36/ds=20 extrapolates cleanly). Smooth cylindrical envelope drawn (the knurl is a fine feature, not modelled, like the thread). bore=10.1 (M12 minor, ISO 724).
